Metadata.rootTitle: Psychologists.Services — Book a Session with a Licensed Psychologist
Metadata.rootDescription: Browse verified psychologist profiles, read patient reviews, and book your session online in minutes. Confidential, flexible, and available 24/7.
Metadata.psychologistsTitle: Psychologists — browse and book a session

Footer.disclaimer: Demo project. All psychologist profiles, reviews, ratings, prices and availability shown on this site are fictional examples created for demonstration purposes only. They do not represent real people, licensed professionals, or actual services.
Footer.author: Designed & developed by Inna Boiko

Home.headline:
The road to the healthy mind

starts here
Home.description: Welcome to Psychologists.Services — your trusted platform for finding licensed psychologists who truly understand you. Browse verified profiles, read reviews, and book appointments in minutes.
Home.cardBio: Empathetic, experienced, and deeply committed to your mental wellness journey.
Home.joinDesc: Join our platform and connect with patients who need your expertise. Simple onboarding, flexible schedule, and a growing community of mental health professionals.
Home.feature1Desc: Search by specialization, price, and experience
Home.feature3Desc: Book your session in just a few clicks
Home.feature4Desc: Your privacy is our top priority

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved. Let us get you back on track.

CookieBanner.text: We use cookies to improve your experience and keep you logged in. By continuing, you agree to our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

Card.label: Psychologist
Card.loginForFavorite: Please log in to add to favorites
Card.appointmentBooked: Appointment booked! We will be in touch.

Favorites.title: Favorites
Favorites.emptyDesc: Browse our psychologists and click the heart icon to save your favorites here for quick access.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1Body: Psychologists.Services ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, why we collect it, and how we use it when you use our platform at psychologists-services-98v1.vercel.app.
Privacy.s2Account: Account data: name and email address provided during registration.
Privacy.s2Appointment: Appointment data: date, time, and the name of the psychologist you book with.
Privacy.s2Favorites: Favorites: the list of psychologists you save as favourites.
Privacy.s2Application: Application data: if you apply as a psychologist, the professional details you submit (name, specialization, licence, price, bio, availability).
Privacy.s3Item1: To create and manage your account.
Privacy.s3Item2: To book and manage appointments with psychologists.
Privacy.s3Item3: To send you a confirmation email when you book an appointment.
Privacy.s3Item4: To save your favourite psychologists across sessions.
Privacy.s3Item5: To show your booked appointments in the notification area.
Privacy.s3Item6: To process and manage psychologist applications.
Privacy.s4Body: We use only strictly necessary cookies to keep you logged in (a secure, HttpOnly session cookie) and to protect authentication requests (CSRF). These cookies do not require consent under GDPR. Your cookie-banner choice is stored locally in your browser (localStorage), not in a cookie. We do not use advertising, analytics, or tracking cookies. Declining means you will not be able to stay logged in.
Privacy.s5Neon: Neon — our PostgreSQL database provider. Your account, appointment, favourites and application data is stored on Neon's managed infrastructure in the EU (Frankfurt, Germany).
Privacy.s5Vercel: Vercel — our hosting provider for the application and its API. Network request logs may be retained by Vercel for security purposes.
Privacy.s5Resend: Resend — our email provider. When you book an appointment, your name, email address and appointment details are sent to Resend solely to deliver the confirmation email.
Privacy.s5Note: We do not sell or share your personal data with any other third parties.
Privacy.s6Body: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. Appointments are kept for up to 60 days after their date for review purposes, then removed from active views. You may request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time.
Privacy.s7Item1: Access the personal data we hold about you.
Privacy.s7Item3: Request deletion of your account and data.
Privacy.s7Item4: Withdraw consent at any time (this will not affect the lawfulness of prior processing).
Privacy.s8Body: For any privacy-related questions or requests, please contact us at privacy@psychologists.services.

AuthModal.loginSubtitle: Welcome back! Please log in to your account.

AuthModal.demoTitle: 🔑 Demo admin — try the publish / edit / delete tools

ReviewModal.title: Leave a review
ReviewModal.subtitle: How was your session? Your feedback helps others find the right psychologist.
ReviewModal.commentPlaceholder: Share your experience with this psychologist…
ReviewModal.errSubmit: Failed to submit review. Please try again.

CancelModal.title: Cancel appointment
CancelModal.question: Are you sure you want to cancel your appointment with {name} on {date}?

DeleteAccountModal.title: Delete account
DeleteAccountModal.heading: Delete your account?
DeleteAccountModal.text: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data, including your appointments and favourites. This action cannot be undone.
DeleteAccountModal.psychologistNotice: Your psychologist profile is currently listed on the platform. It will be removed from the listings within 2–3 business days. You will be contacted at your registered email once it is taken down.
DeleteAccountModal.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ErrorState.title: Something went wrong
ErrorState.description: We couldn't load this page. Please try again — if the problem persists, come back in a few minutes.

ApplyModal.title: Apply as a Psychologist
ApplyModal.subtitle: Join our platform and help people with their mental health. Fill in your professional details below.
ApplyModal.notice: Your profile will be reviewed by our team before being published. This usually takes 2–3 business days.
ApplyModal.successText: Your application has been received and is under review. Our team will contact you within 2–3 business days.
ApplyModal.applyingAs: You are applying with your account {email}.
ApplyModal.accountHint: An account will be created automatically so you can manage your profile. Already have one? <login>Log in first</login>
ApplyModal.availabilityHint: Set your working hours. Patients will only be able to book slots within these times.
ApplyModal.aboutPlaceholder: Describe your approach, methods, and experience (min. 50 characters)
ApplyModal.consent: I agree to the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and consent to the processing of my personal data
ApplyModal.errConsent: You must accept the Privacy Policy to submit
ApplyModal.errEmailTaken: This email is already registered. Please log in first.
ApplyModal.errAccount: Failed to create account. Please try again.
ApplyModal.errApi: Failed to submit application. Please try again.

Appointment.title: Make an appointment
Appointment.heading: Make an appointment with a psychologist
Appointment.subtitle: You are on the verge of changing your life for the better. Fill in the short form below to book your personal appointment with a professional psychologist. We guarantee confidentiality and respect for your privacy.
Appointment.authNotice: Log in or register to track and cancel your appointment up to 24h before.
Appointment.name: Name
Appointment.selectDateHint: Select a date first to see available slots
Appointment.noSlots: No available slots on this day
Appointment.errApi: Failed to schedule appointment. Please try again.
